title: Nightmare Obsessed
description: Reskins The Obsessed into a consistently creepy design, including adjusted animations and forms
body:
![Nightmare Obsessed text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd8e27c34829a09fe081467af9d37a956a87d5f6.png)

Introducing the **Nightmare Obsessed** 

An alternative skin for [The Obsessed](https://modrinth.com/mod/obsessed) that enables it to provide a full horror aesthetic right from the start, for those who prefer it to be creepy at all times! The obsessed is an entity that attempts to lure the player in by appearing friendly at first, but becomes more dangerous and nightmarish over time if not kept happy.

![Nightmare Obsessed entity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e90796da8ea9cb3a8f0c334ad7e143ea7e90cd33_0.webp)

This also serves as a useful resource pack template for anyone interested in creating their own reskin for The Obsessed, providing a base geckolib model/animation/texture compilation. If you make your own, I recommend to avoid removing bones (folders in Blockbench) as this could cause crashes. Adding more is fine - feel free to contact me for any further queries.
